creator: leres@freebsd.org
text:
I'm not familiar with the wiki page you referenced; I do know that the esp-idf tree you use needs to match the version of the xtensa toolchain. One thing to try is building with version 3.3.4 of esp-idf.

I created the devel/xtensa-esp32-elf port so I could build and develop https://github.com/openvehicles/Open-Vehicle-Monitoring-System-3 under FreeBSD. Unfortunately this project is still using an older version of esp-idf so I'm stuck for now.

Something I've considered to support folks who want to use the latest version of the toolchain would be to create a -devel version of xtensa-esp32-elf. Would it be useful to have a toolchain based on the esp-2021r2 version of crosstool-NG?
